title: La gran familia
writer: Pedro Masó, Rafael J. Salvia, Antonio Vich
actors: Alberto Closas, Amparo Soler Leal, José Isbert
plot: Carlos Alonso and Mercedes Cebrián are parents of fifteen children of different ages. They all live with the grandfather and depend exclusively on Carlos work (moonlighting rigger) as the sole breadwinner, which puts them in const...
